skip_patterns.resolved_to: 3-tier: 250+ = showed interest to join (marketing copy only); ~40-52 = actual members inside TopicBoard (live count from Supabase portal_users WHERE status='active', never cite in marketing); 117 = LinkedIn profiles scraped (internal tracking only)

skip_patterns.pattern: memory snapshot vs github pr state
skip_patterns.resolved_to: github-api wins; memory snapshots go stale within ~2 weeks

skip_patterns.pattern: live member count vs cached doc count
skip_patterns.resolved_to: Supabase portal_users live query wins; cached counts in facts.yaml/docs go stale within ~30 days
